text: let's refactor the aim list entering. first l expands, second l enters subaim selection
description: then, when in subaim selection, esc should do the same as h: end subaim selection. keeping the parent aim expanded and selected.

status.comment: Refactored aim navigation: 'l' expands then enters sub-aims. 'h' collapses or goes to parent (keeping expanded). 'Esc' goes to parent (keeping expanded) or exits navigation mode.
